category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Bolivia.

title.en: China-to-Bolivia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入玻利维亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入玻利維亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Bolivia IBNORCA / AE / ENDE requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 connector landscape (connector standard unconfirmed — verify with AE/IBNORCA), ENDE and distributor grid-connection requirements, OCPP interoperability, high-altitude derating for the Bolivian Altiplano, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与玻利维亚IBNORCA / AE / ENDE要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196接口现状（接口标准尚未确认——请向AE/IBNORCA核实）、ENDE及分销商并网要求、OCPP互操作、玻利维亚高原高海拔降额，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與玻利維亞IBNORCA / AE / ENDE要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196接口現狀（接口標準尚未確認——請向AE/IBNORCA核實）、ENDE及分銷商併網要求、OCPP互操作、玻利維亞高原高海拔降額，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Bolivia, the confirmed practical gaps are: IEC-based safety evidence required under IEC 61851 (Bolivia's regulatory framework references IEC standards via IBNORCA NB adoptions); connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to an IEC 62196-compatible connector — the specific connector standard mandated in Bolivia is unconfirmed as of 2026-06-14 and must be verified directly with AE (Autoridad de Electricidad) and IBNORCA, since the Americas region is a mixed IEC/SAE landscape and Bolivia's 50 Hz grid does not automatically resolve to J1772/CCS1; IBNORCA conformity assessment and AE/distributor coordination for grid-connected installations; high-altitude thermal and dielectric derating for the Bolivian Altiplano (La Paz/El Alto at 3,600–4,100 m above sea level, Potosí at ~4,000 m); Bolivia operates on 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz — not 60 Hz — which differs from China's 220 V / 380 V, 50 Hz baseline and requires voltage-range confirmation. The Bolivia EV charging market is extremely nascent; state EV ambitions are anchored in Bolivia's lithium resource strategy (Bolivia holds the world's largest known lithium reserves), but public charging deployment is minimal as of 2026-06-14. Exporters should verify the current conformity assessment route, AE approval, connector type, and ENDE/distributor connection requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入玻利维亚时，已确认的实务差距包括：依据IEC 61851要求的IEC体系安全证据（玻利维亚监管框架通过IBNORCA NB采标引用IEC标准）；需将接口从GB/T 20234改为兼容IEC 62196的接口——截至2026年6月14日，玻利维亚强制要求的具体接口标准尚未确认，须直接向AE（电力监管局）和IBNORCA核实，因为美洲地区存在IEC/SAE混合格局，玻利维亚50 Hz电网并不自动对应J1772/CCS1；面向并网安装的IBNORCA合格评定及AE/分销商协调；针对玻利维亚高原（拉巴斯/埃尔阿尔托海拔3,600–4,100米，波托西约4,000米）的高海拔热性能和绝缘降额；玻利维亚采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz电网——非60 Hz——与中国220 V / 380 V、50 Hz基线不同，须确认输入电压范围。玻利维亚电动汽车充电市场极为初期；国家电动汽车雄心以玻利维亚锂资源战略为基础（玻利维亚拥有全球已知最大锂矿储量），但截至2026年6月14日，公共充电基础设施部署极为有限。出口商应在出货前核实现行合格评定路径、AE审批、接口类型及ENDE/分销商接入要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入玻利維亞時，已確認的實務差距包括：依據IEC 61851要求的IEC體系安全證據（玻利維亞監管框架通過IBNORCA NB採標引用IEC標準）；需將接口從GB/T 20234改為兼容IEC 62196的接口——截至2026年6月14日，玻利維亞強制要求的具體接口標準尚未確認，須直接向AE（電力監管局）和IBNORCA核實，因為美洲地區存在IEC/SAE混合格局，玻利維亞50 Hz電網並不自動對應J1772/CCS1；面向併網安裝的IBNORCA合格評定及AE/分銷商協調；針對玻利維亞高原（拉巴斯/埃爾阿爾托海拔3,600–4,100米，波托西約4,000米）的高海拔熱性能和絕緣降額；玻利維亞採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz電網——非60 Hz——與中國220 V / 380 V、50 Hz基線不同，須確認輸入電壓範圍。玻利維亞電動汽車充電市場極為初期；國家電動汽車雄心以玻利維亞鋰資源戰略為基礎（玻利維亞擁有全球已知最大鋰礦儲量），但截至2026年6月14日，公共充電基礎設施部署極為有限。出口商應在出貨前核實現行合格評定路徑、AE審批、接口類型及ENDE/分銷商接入要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IBNORCA scope determination, AE approval, ENDE connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Bolivia conformity assessment rules, AE and ENDE/distributor grid-connection requirements, IBNORCA standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IBNORCA适用范围裁定、AE批准、ENDE接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行玻利维亚合格评定规则、AE及ENDE/分销商并网要求、IBNORCA标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IBNORCA適用範圍裁定、AE批准、ENDE接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行玻利維亞合格評定規則、AE及ENDE/分銷商併網要求、IBNORCA標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
